summary: Added a minimal exit bridge so the chapter hands off more cleanly from the five-station realization on the landing into the ruined-chapel setup that opens chapter 17, while leaving the chapter opening and core beats unchanged.
edits: Added a final transition beat from Iven's close perspective showing Daro pull free of the housing and the group head for the chapel.
Clarified Daro's shift from prophetic posture into practical action immediately before the next chapter's setup.
